title: LEBOCADO Dinosaur Toys Building Blocks Sets, 6 in 1 STEM Toys Eggs Building Sets Mini Dinosaur Building Bricks, Party Favors for Easter Basket Stuffers/Easter Egg Hunt/Classroom Events
features: 🦖【6 in 1 Fun Dinosaur Building Blocks】The dinosaur building toys set has 6 different dinosaurs: thunder dragon, velociraptor, triceratops, stegosaurus, ankylosaurus and pterosaur. Each dinosaur has step-by-step instructions to assemble these using the building blocks. Additionally, these 6 small dinosaurs can be combined into a large dino “the tyrannosaurus”. Let the kids create their own dream dinosaur game of Jurassic Dinosaur world.

🛠️【Easy to Assemble】These dinosaur building blocks set are easy to use and assemble. The building blocks fit securely to each other. Boost your kids’ imagination with our toy. LEBOCADO mini blocks can help inspire children’s brains to think, develop multiple skills such as hand-eye coordination, spatial structure and logical thinking. Rich color matching can also improve children’s interest in building and color recognition ability.

✅【Safety Premium Quality】Our dinosaur building blocks toys are made of high-quality, environment friendly ABS material, safe, non-toxic, and durable, with a smooth surface, rounded edges and corners, without burrs. LEBOCADO dinosaur building blocks offer 12 months of quality guaranteed. It contains small parts, so it is not suitable for kids under 3 years.

🦕【Flexible Joints】The simulation design allows each dinosaur toy to have different poses by moving the head, feet, and wing joints, making dinosaurs more vivid and realistic. It can be decorated with dinosaur eggs, street lamps, and grass to create a more lifelike dinosaur world for kids. Each assembled dinosaur can also be used as an interior decoration to attract children's attention and add fun to their rooms.

🎁【Perfect Party Favors Gifts】These dino eggs are a splendid gift for boy. This great value dinosaur set can be the prize for kids, birthday gift , for halloween/christmas goodie bags, or return gift. It is suitable for several kids to play together.
description: Product Description Detailed Assembly Instructions Each dinosaur egg will have a detailed assembly manual, graphic instructions, more easy to understand. 6 in 1 Dinosaur Egg Blocks The dinosaur building toys set has 6 different dinosaur types: thunder dragon, velociraptor, triceratops, stegosaurus, ankylosaurus and pterosaur. Wide Applications This great value set is suitable for Easter egg hunting activities, Easter basket fillers, birthday gifts, party prizes, Christmas gifts, school events, etc. Product Name: Dinosaur Building Toys Set Product Size: 8cm×5.5cm/3.1in×2.2in Quantity: 12 PCS Item Weight: 30g / 1pcs Including Box: √ Suitable Age: Age 6+
